title: Restaurant Onboarding
description: Let's set up your restaurant profile and create your homepage content with AI assistance.

basic.title: Basic Information
basic.description: Essential restaurant details and contact information

aiGeneration.title: AI Content Generation
aiGeneration.description: Generate homepage content with AI assistance

aiInfo.title: AI-Powered Content Creation
aiInfo.description: Tell us about your restaurant and we'll generate hero text, owner story, and signature dishes for your homepage.

style.label: Restaurant Style
style.placeholder: Casual dining, fine dining, family-friendly, etc.

specialties.label: Specialties & Features
specialties.placeholder: Wood-fired pizza, fresh seafood, local ingredients, etc.

generation.error: Failed to generate content. Please try again.

media.title: Media Upload
media.description: Upload your restaurant logo, owner photo, and gallery images

logo.title: Restaurant Logo
logo.description: Upload your restaurant logo for branding
logo.requirements: PNG, JPG, or GIF up to 5MB. Square format recommended.

ownerPhoto.title: Owner Photo
ownerPhoto.description: Upload a photo of yourself for the owner story section
ownerPhoto.requirements: PNG, JPG, or GIF up to 5MB. Square format recommended.

gallery.title: Gallery Images
gallery.description: Upload photos of your restaurant, food, and atmosphere
gallery.requirements: PNG, JPG, or GIF up to 5MB each. Multiple images allowed.

errors.invalidFileType: Please select a valid image file
errors.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 5MB

review.title: Review & Complete
review.description: Review your restaurant information and complete the onboarding process.

completion.title: Ready to Launch!
completion.description: Your restaurant profile is ready. Once you complete onboarding, you'll have access to:

features.homepage: A beautiful homepage with your content

completion.success: Onboarding completed successfully! Welcome to your restaurant dashboard.
completion.success_with_warnings: Onboarding completed with some issues. Check the warnings below.
completion.error: Failed to complete onboarding. Please try again.
